description: You are an architectural detailer preparing the pre-loaded FZK-Haus residential building model for procurement (LOD 350). Model geometry for at least three door hardware accessories (such as handles, closers, or panic bars) using simple shapes and assign them the IFC class 'IfcDiscreteAccessory'. Position these accessories so they sit on or immediately adjacent to existing doors (within 1.5 meters) and nest each accessory into its respective 'IfcDoor' parent element using an IfcRelNests relationship. Define and associate a metallic material (name must contain 'Steel', 'Metal', 'Aluminium', 'Brass', 'Iron', or 'Chrome') with the hardware accessories. Save the enriched project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_doors_detailed.ifc.
